name: Chainmail Bikini
short_description: Join Brandi the Red and her heroic companions as they hunt monsters for fun and profit in this RPG game!
detailed_description:
Chainmail Bikini is an RPG game, built in RPG Maker MV, that follows the cheeky adventures of a hero named Brandi the Red and her companions as they hunt monsters for fun and profit. It is designed to offer a fun and quick RPG experience, suitable for the casual player or for any RPG fan.

This game includes 4 playable characters, uses keyboard controls, holds 4 main quests, one sidequest, and dozens of monsters to fight in turn-based combat. Offers 3-5 hours of play, perfect for fans of RPG games for whom time is precious!
